full_text:
Bu Si еҚңе·і
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bu Si (еҚңе·і)was born in Dong. Local leader, captured and killed by Fu Xie. Bu Si was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Bu Si lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
